subject: [PATCH v4 8/8] mm: switch deferred split shrinker to list_lru

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch switches the deferred split shrinker to use list_lru, which properly sets up per-node and per-cgroup lists. This improves handling of cgroups in a suboptimal fashion by avoiding imperfect guard rails and streamlining list operations and reclaim walks. The change also instantiates list_lru heads on demand when the first object is allocated for a cgroup, eliminating special care needed for node migration.
